channel.title: The Psychology Files
channel.description: Exploring the hidden mechanics of the human mind. Every episode we dive deep into psychology, behaviour, and the mental patterns that shape who we are.
channel.itunes:author: The Psychology Files

item.title: The Ghost Life: Why Your Unlived Dreams Are Destroying You
item.description: Carl Jung believed the paths we don't take create more psychological damage than the ones we do. Discover why successful people feel haunted by their unlived lives and how suppressed dreams manifest as depression, midlife crises, and neurosis.

item.title: Why Smart People Stay Trapped in Toxic Relationships for Years
item.description: Your brain becomes literally addicted to narcissistic partners through intermittent reinforcement, trauma bonding, and cognitive tricks that override your survival instincts. We expose the hidden psychological mechanisms that keep intelligent people trapped long after red flags appear.

item.title: The Sadistic Smirk: When Your Partner Enjoys Your Pain
item.description: That split-second expression when your partner seems to enjoy your discomfort might reveal something chilling about their true nature. We explore the hidden psychology of micro-expressions and what to do when you spot the warning signs.

item.title: Your Brain's Hidden Stop Switch (And Why It's Broken)
item.description: Scientists discovered the neural 'stop switch' that controls appetite - but modern food has hijacked it. Learn why willpower fails and how to work with your brain's wiring instead of fighting it.

item.title: I Study AI Manipulation. It Still Got Me.
item.description: A researcher who studies algorithmic manipulation confesses how AI systems exploit our psychology so effectively that even experts fall victim. Discover why our brains are defenseless against digital manipulation and what we can do about it.

item.title: Why Your Brain Tricks You Into Thinking Sadness Is Depression
item.description: Millions confuse normal sadness with clinical depression—and this mistake is literally rewiring their brains to make them sicker. We expose how social media and pharmaceutical marketing profit from this dangerous confusion.

item.title: When Sadness Becomes Depression: The Hidden Line
item.description: Right now, someone is making a life-changing decision without knowing it - whether their pain is normal sadness or clinical depression. Get it wrong either way and the consequences can be devastating. We explore the hidden markers that separate adaptive human emotion from a medical condition that literally changes your brain.

item.title: Your Brain on Junk: How Big Food Hijacks Your Mind
item.description: Food companies use the same psychological tactics as drug dealers to keep you hooked. We explore the neuroscience of food addiction and how ultra-processed foods are literally rewiring our brains for mental illness.

item.title: Why Your Sadness Isn't Depression (And Why It Matters)
item.description: Millions of people confuse normal sadness with clinical depression, and this misunderstanding is preventing proper treatment while pathologizing healthy human emotions. We break down the critical differences and why sadness might actually be your brain's way of protecting you.

item.title: Can Trauma Actually Make You Stronger? The Science Says...
item.description: 70% of trauma survivors report positive life changes from their suffering. We explore the neuroscience of post-traumatic growth and why some people emerge stronger from adversity while others don't.

item.title: Your Sadness Isn't Depression (But How Do You Know?)
item.description: Robin Williams was cracking jokes weeks before his suicide - revealing the dangerous gap between how we think depression looks and its brutal reality. Explore why everyone misunderstands depression until they face it themselves.

item.title: Your Brain on Junk Food: How Big Food Hijacks Your Mind
item.description: Ultra-processed foods trigger the same addiction pathways as cocaine, and food companies know it. Discover the dark psychology tactics used to hijack your brain's reward system and learn how to break free from engineered food addiction.
